text.title: Onion Architecture Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how arch-pattern-onion produces a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path application
example.code:
--- artefact_id: onion-layout-shop-2026-05-23 owner: Ruslan Faion <ruslan@faion.net> ---
# Shop — Onion Layout (.NET-style)
## Layer 1 — Domain Model - `Domain.Model.Order`, `Domain.Model.LineItem`
## Layer 2 — Domain Services - `Domain.Services.OrderPricingService`
## Layer 3 — Application Services - `Application.Services.PlaceOrderService`
## Layer 4 — Infrastructure / UI / Tests - `Infrastructure.Persistence.EfOrderRepository` - `UI.Web.OrderController` - `Tests.IntegrationTests`
## Lint - Tool: ArchUnit - Contract: layered; Domain.* MUST NOT import Infrastructure.*, UI.*.
example.note: Demonstrates the rules from 01-core-rules.xml applied to a concrete input; output validates against the schema in 02-output-contract.xml.
